user_query: I'm planning a road trip with my family from Los Angeles to Las Vegas. Can you provide me with the weather forecast for both cities for the next three days? Also, recommend some scenic routes and attractions along the way.

TaskList.description: Get the weather forecast for Los Angeles for the next three days.
Get the weather forecast for Las Vegas for the next three days.
Find scenic routes from Los Angeles to Las Vegas.
Recommend attractions along the route from Los Angeles to Las Vegas.
